tEn: Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
tZh: 基于联合嵌入预测架构的图像自监督学习
sEn: I-JEPA learns semantic image representations by predicting target block representations from a single context block without hand-crafted augmentations.
sZh: I-JEPA通过从单个上下文块预测目标块表示来学习语义图像表示，无需手工数据增强。
absEn: This paper demonstrates an approach for learning highly semantic image representations without relying on hand-crafted data-augmentations. We introduce the Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (I-JEPA), a non-generative approach for self-supervised learning from images. The idea behind I-JEPA is simple: from a single context block, predict the representations of various target blocks in the same image. A core design choice to guide I-JEPA towards producing semantic representations is the masking strategy; specifically, it is crucial to (a) sample target blocks with sufficiently large scale (semantic), and to (b) use a sufficiently informative (spatially distributed) context block. Empirically, when combined with Vision Transformers, we find I-JEPA to be highly scalable. For instance, we train a ViT-Huge/14 on ImageNet using 16 A100 GPUs in under 72 hours to achieve strong downstream performance across a wide range of tasks, from linear classification to object counting and depth prediction.
absZh: 本文展示了一种无需依赖手工数据增强即可学习高语义图像表示的方法。我们提出了基于图像的联合嵌入预测架构（I-JEPA），这是一种用于图像自监督学习的非生成式方法。I-JEPA的核心思想很简单：从单个上下文块预测同一图像中多个目标块的表示。引导I-JEPA产生语义表示的一个关键设计选择是掩码策略；具体来说，至关重要的是（a）采样足够大尺度（语义）的目标块，以及（b）使用信息量足够大（空间分布）的上下文块。实验表明，当与Vision Transformer结合时，I-JEPA具有高度可扩展性。例如，我们在ImageNet上使用16块A100 GPU在不到72小时内训练了ViT-Huge/14，在从线性分类到目标计数和深度预测的广泛任务中实现了强大的下游性能。

contrib.en: Introduces I-JEPA, a non-generative self-supervised method predicting target block representations from a single context block.
contrib.zh: 提出I-JEPA，一种非生成式自监督方法，从单个上下文块预测目标块表示。

contrib.en: Shows that predicting in representation space yields more semantic features than pixel-level reconstruction.
contrib.zh: 表明在表示空间中进行预测比像素级重建能产生更具语义的特征。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that a multi-block masking strategy with large target blocks and informative context is crucial for semantic representations.
contrib.zh: 证明使用大目标块和信息性上下文的多块掩码策略对语义表示至关重要。

contrib.en: Achieves strong downstream performance across tasks like linear classification, object counting, and depth prediction without hand-crafted augmentations.
contrib.zh: 无需手工数据增强，在线性分类、目标计数和深度预测等任务上实现强下游性能。

contrib.en: Shows high scalability: ViT-H/14 on ImageNet trained with 16 A100 GPUs in under 72 hours, outperforming prior methods in compute efficiency.
contrib.zh: 展示高可扩展性：在ImageNet上使用16块A100 GPU在72小时内训练ViT-H/14，计算效率优于先前方法。

limits.en: Evaluation primarily on ImageNet-1K; generalization to other domains or modalities not fully explored.
limits.zh: 评估主要在ImageNet-1K上进行，未充分探索对其他领域或模态的泛化。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of masking strategy (target block scale and context informativeness) for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调整掩码策略（目标块尺度和上下文信息量）以达到最佳性能。

limits.en: Performance on semantic tasks may still lag behind view-invariance methods that use hand-crafted augmentations in some settings.
limits.zh: 在某些设置下，语义任务性能可能仍落后于使用手工增强的视图不变方法。

limits.en: Dependence on exponential moving average target encoder adds complexity and hyperparameter sensitivity.
limits.zh: 依赖指数移动平均目标编码器增加了复杂性和超参数敏感性。

items.en: This paper demonstrates an approach for learning highly semantic image representations without relying on hand-crafted data-augmentations. We introduce the Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (I-JEPA), a non-generative approach for self-supervised learning from images. The idea behind I-JEPA is simple: from a single context block, predict the representations of various target blocks in the same image. A core design choice to guide I-JEPA towards producing semantic representations is the masking strategy; specifically, it is crucial to (a) sample target blocks with sufficiently large scale (semantic), and to (b) use a sufficiently informative (spatially distributed) context block. Empirically, when combined with Vision Transformers, we find I-JEPA to be highly scalable. For instance, we train a ViT-Huge/14 on ImageNet using 16 A100 GPUs in under 72 hours to achieve strong downstream performance across a wide range of tasks, from linear classification to object counting and depth prediction.
items.zh: 本文展示了一种无需依赖手工数据增强即可学习高语义图像表示的方法。我们提出了基于图像的联合嵌入预测架构（I-JEPA），这是一种用于图像自监督学习的非生成式方法。I-JEPA 的核心思想很简单：从单个上下文块出发，预测同一图像中各个目标块的表示。引导 I-JEPA 产生语义表示的一个关键设计选择是掩码策略；具体来说，至关重要的是 (a) 采样足够大尺度（语义）的目标块，以及 (b) 使用信息量足够大（空间分布）的上下文块。实验表明，当与 Vision Transformer 结合时，I-JEPA 具有高度可扩展性。例如，我们在 ImageNet 上使用 16 个 A100 GPU 在 72 小时内训练了一个 ViT-Huge/14，在从线性分类到目标计数和深度预测的广泛任务中取得了强大的下游性能。

items.capEn: Figure 1: ImageNet Linear Evaluation. The I-JEPA method learns semantic image representations without using any view data augmentations during pretraining. By predicting in representation space, I-JEPA produces semantic representations while using less compute than previous methods.
items.capZh: 图 1：ImageNet 线性评估。I-JEPA 方法在预训练期间无需使用任何视图数据增强即可学习语义图像表示。通过在表示空间中进行预测，I-JEPA 在生成语义表示的同时，使用的算力少于先前的方法。

items.en: In computer vision, there are two common families of approaches for self-supervised learning from images: invariance-based methods [4, 37, 17, 24, 35, 18, 74, 10, 1] and generative methods [28, 8, 57, 36].
items.zh: 在计算机视觉中，有两种常见的图像自监督学习方法：基于不变性的方法 [4, 37, 17, 24, 35, 18, 74, 10, 1] 和生成式方法 [28, 8, 57, 36]。

items.en: Invariance-based pretraining methods optimize an encoder to produce similar embeddings for two or more views of the same image [15, 20], with image views typically constructed using a set of hand-crafted data augmentations, such as random scaling, cropping, and color jittering [20], amongst others [35]. These pretraining methods can produce representations of a high semantic level [18, 4], but they also introduce strong biases that may be detrimental for certain downstream tasks or even for pretraining tasks with different data distributions [2]. Often, it is unclear how to generalize these biases for tasks requiring different levels of abstraction. For example, image classification and instance segmentation do not require the same invariances [11]. Additionally, it is not straightforward to generalize these image-specific augmentations to other modalities such as audio.
items.zh: 基于不变性的预训练方法优化编码器，使其对同一图像的两个或多个视图生成相似的嵌入 [15, 20]，图像视图通常使用一组手工数据增强来构建，例如随机缩放、裁剪和颜色抖动 [20] 等 [35]。这些预训练方法可以产生高语义水平的表示 [18, 4]，但它们也引入了强烈的偏差，可能对某些下游任务甚至不同数据分布的预训练任务有害 [2]。通常，如何将这些偏差推广到需要不同抽象级别的任务尚不清楚。例如，图像分类和实例分割不需要相同的不变性 [11]。此外，将这些图像特定的增强推广到其他模态（如音频）并不直接。

items.en: Cognitive learning theories have suggested that a driving mechanism behind representation learning in biological systems is the adaptation of an internal model to predict sensory input responses [59, 31]. This idea is at the core of self-supervised generative methods, which remove or corrupt portions of the input and learn to predict the corrupted content [67, 57, 36, 9, 71, 68]. In particular, mask-denoising approaches learn representations by reconstructing randomly masked patches from an input, either at the pixel or token level. Masked pretraining tasks require less prior knowledge than view-invariance approaches and easily generalize beyond the image modality [8]. However, the resulting representations are typically of a lower semantic level and underperform invariance-based pretraining in off-the-shelf evaluations (e.g., linear-probing) and in transfer settings with limited supervision for semantic classification tasks [4]. Consequently, a more involved adaptation mechanism (e.g., end-to-end fine-tuning) is required to reap the full advantage of these methods.
items.zh: 认知学习理论表明，生物系统中表示学习背后的驱动机制是内部模型适应以预测感觉输入响应 [59, 31]。这一思想是自监督生成式方法的核心，这些方法移除或破坏输入的部分内容，并学习预测被破坏的内容 [67, 57, 36, 9, 71, 68]。特别是，掩码去噪方法通过从输入中重建随机掩码的补丁来学习表示，无论是在像素级还是 token 级。掩码预训练任务比视图不变性方法需要更少的先验知识，并且容易推广到图像模态之外 [8]。然而，得到的表示通常语义水平较低，在现成评估（例如线性探测）和有限监督的语义分类任务迁移设置中表现不如基于不变性的预训练 [4]。因此，需要更复杂的适应机制（例如端到端微调）才能充分利用这些方法的优势。

items.en: In this work, we explore how to improve the semantic level of self-supervised representations without using extra prior knowledge encoded through image transformations. To that end, we introduce a joint-embedding predictive architecture [48] for images (I-JEPA). An illustration of the method is provided in Figure 3. The idea behind I-JEPA is to predict missing information in an abstract representation space; e.g., given a single context block, predict the representations of various target blocks in the same image, where target representations are computed by a learned target-encoder network.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索如何在不使用通过图像变换编码的额外先验知识的情况下，提高自监督表示的语义水平。为此，我们提出了一种用于图像的联合嵌入预测架构 [48]（I-JEPA）。该方法如图 3 所示。I-JEPA 的核心思想是在抽象表示空间中预测缺失信息；例如，给定一个上下文块，预测同一图像中各个目标块的表示，其中目标表示由学习到的目标编码器网络计算。

items.en: Compared to generative methods that predict in pixel/token space, I-JEPA makes use of abstract prediction targets for which unnecessary pixel-level details are potentially eliminated, thereby leading the model to learn more semantic features. Another core design choice to guide I-JEPA towards producing semantic representations is the proposed multi-block masking strategy. Specifically, we demonstrate the importance of predicting sufficiently large target blocks in the image, using an informative (spatially distributed) context block.
items.zh: 与在像素/token 空间中进行预测的生成式方法相比，I-JEPA 使用了抽象的预测目标，这些目标可能消除了不必要的像素级细节，从而引导模型学习更具语义的特征。引导 I-JEPA 产生语义表示的另一个核心设计选择是所提出的多块掩码策略。具体来说，我们证明了使用信息量大的（空间分布的）上下文块来预测图像中足够大的目标块的重要性。

items.en: Through an extensive empirical evaluation, we demonstrate that:
items.zh: 通过广泛的实证评估，我们证明了：

items.en: I-JEPA learns strong off-the-shelf representations without the use of hand-crafted view augmentations (cf. Fig.1). I-JEPA outperforms pixel-reconstruction methods such as MAE [36] on ImageNet-1K linear probing, semi-supervised 1% ImageNet-1K, and semantic transfer tasks.
items.zh: I-JEPA 无需使用手工视图增强即可学习强大的现成表示（参见图 1）。I-JEPA 在 ImageNet-1K 线性探测、半监督 1% ImageNet-1K 和语义迁移任务上优于像素重建方法（如 MAE [36]）。

items.en: I-JEPA is competitive with view-invariant pretraining approaches on semantic tasks and achieves better performance on low-level visions tasks such as object counting and depth prediction (Sections 5 and 6). By using a simpler model with less rigid inductive bias, I-JEPA is applicable to a wider set of tasks.
items.zh: I-JEPA 在语义任务上与视图不变性预训练方法具有竞争力，并在低级视觉任务（如目标计数和深度预测）上取得更好的性能（第 5 节和第 6 节）。通过使用更简单、归纳偏置更少的模型，I-JEPA 适用于更广泛的任务。

items.en: I-JEPA is also scalable and efficient (Section 7). Pre-training a ViT-H/14 on ImageNet requires less than 1200 GPU hours, which is over 2.5×2.5\times faster than a ViT-S/16 pretrained with iBOT[79] and over 10×10\times more efficient than a ViT-H/14 pretrained with MAE. Predicting in representation space significantly reduces the total computation needed for self-supervised pretraining.
items.zh: I-JEPA 也具有可扩展性和高效性（第 7 节）。在 ImageNet 上预训练 ViT-H/14 需要不到 1200 GPU 小时，比使用 iBOT [79] 预训练的 ViT-S/16 快 2.5 倍以上，比使用 MAE 预训练的 ViT-H/14 高效 10 倍以上。在表示空间中进行预测显著减少了自监督预训练所需的总计算量。

items.en: Self-supervised learning is an approach to representation learning in which a system learns to capture the relationships between its inputs. This objective can be readily described using the framework of Energy-Based Models (EBMs) [49] in which the self-supervised objective is to assign a high energy to incompatible inputs, and to assign a low energy to compatible inputs. Many existing generative and non-generative approaches to self-supervised learning can indeed be cast in this framework; see Figure 2.
items.zh: 自监督学习是一种表示学习方法，其中系统学习捕获其输入之间的关系。这个目标可以很容易地使用基于能量的模型（EBM）框架 [49] 来描述，其中自监督目标是为不兼容的输入分配高能量，为兼容的输入分配低能量。许多现有的生成式和非生成式自监督学习方法确实可以纳入这个框架；参见图 2。

items.en: Invariance-based pretraining can be cast in the framework of EBMs using a Joint-Embedding Architecture (JEA), which learns to output similar embeddings for compatible inputs, 𝒙,𝒚𝒙𝒚{\bm{x}},{\bm{y}}, and dissimilar embeddings for incompatible inputs; see Figure 2(a). In the context of image-based pretraining, compatible 𝒙,𝒚𝒙𝒚{\bm{x}},{\bm{y}} pairs are typically constructed by randomly applying hand-crafted data augmentations to the same input image [20].
items.zh: 基于不变性的预训练可以使用联合嵌入架构（JEA）在 EBM 框架中实现，该架构学习为兼容的输入 𝒙,𝒚 输出相似的嵌入，为不兼容的输入输出不同的嵌入；参见图 2(a)。在基于图像的预训练背景下，兼容的 𝒙,𝒚 对通常通过对同一输入图像随机应用手工数据增强来构建 [20]。

items.en: The main challenge with JEAs is representation collapse, wherein the energy landscape is flat (i.e., the encoder produces a constant output regardless of the input). During the past few years, several approaches have been investigated to prevent representation collapse, such as contrastive losses that explicitly push apart embeddings of negative examples [15, 37, 24], non-contrastive losses that minimize the informational redundancy across embeddings [74, 10], and clustering-based approaches that maximize the entropy of the average embedding [18, 5, 4]. There are also heuristic approaches that leverage an asymmetric architectural design between the x𝑥x-encoder and y𝑦y-encoder to avoid collapse [24, 35, 8].
items.zh: JEA 的主要挑战是表示坍缩，即能量景观是平坦的（即编码器无论输入如何都产生恒定输出）。在过去几年中，研究了几种防止表示坍缩的方法，例如显式推开负样本嵌入的对比损失 [15, 37, 24]、最小化嵌入间信息冗余的非对比损失 [74, 10]，以及最大化平均嵌入熵的聚类方法 [18, 5, 4]。还有一些启发式方法利用 x 编码器和 y 编码器之间的非对称架构设计来避免坍缩 [24, 35, 8]。

items.en: Reconstruction-based methods for self-supervised learning can also be cast in the framework of EBMs using Generative Architectures; see Figure 2(b). Generative Architectures learn to directly reconstruct a signal 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} from a compatible signal 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}, using a decoder network that is conditioned on an additional (possibly latent) variable 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} to facilitate reconstruction. In the context of image-based pretraining, one common approach in computer vision is to produce compatible 𝒙,𝒚𝒙𝒚{\bm{x}},{\bm{y}} pairs using masking [38, 9] where 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} is a copy of the image 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}}, but with some of the patches masked. The conditioning variable 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} then corresponds to a set of (possibly learnable) mask and position tokens, that specifies to the decoder which image patches to reconstruct. Representation collapse is not a concern with these architectures as long as the informational capacity of 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} is low compared to the signal 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}}.
items.zh: 基于重建的自监督学习方法也可以使用生成式架构在 EBM 框架中实现；参见图 2(b)。生成式架构学习从兼容信号 𝒙 直接重建信号 𝒚，使用一个以额外（可能是潜在）变量 𝒛 为条件的解码器网络来促进重建。在基于图像的预训练背景下，计算机视觉中一种常见的方法是使用掩码 [38, 9] 生成兼容的 𝒙,𝒚 对，其中 𝒙 是图像 𝒚 的副本，但某些补丁被掩码。条件变量 𝒛 然后对应于一组（可能是可学习的）掩码和位置 token，向解码器指定要重建哪些图像补丁。只要 𝒛 的信息容量相对于信号 𝒚 较低，这些架构就不存在表示坍缩的问题。

items.en: As shown in Figure 2(c), Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures [48] are conceptually similar to Generative Architectures; however, a key difference is that the loss function is applied in embedding space, not input space. JEPAs learn to predict the embeddings of a signal 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}} from a compatible signal 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}, using a predictor network that is conditioned on an additional (possibly latent) variable 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}} to facilitate prediction. Our proposed I-JEPA provides an instantiation of this architecture in the context of images using masking; see Figure 3.
items.zh: 如图 2(c) 所示，联合嵌入预测架构 [48] 在概念上与生成式架构相似；然而，一个关键区别在于损失函数应用于嵌入空间，而不是输入空间。JEPA 学习从兼容信号 𝒙 预测信号 𝒚 的嵌入，使用一个以额外（可能是潜在）变量 𝒛 为条件的预测器网络来促进预测。我们提出的 I-JEPA 提供了该架构在图像上下文中的实例化，使用掩码；参见图 3。

items.en: In contrast to Joint-Embedding Architectures, JEPAs do not seek representations invariant to a set of hand-crafted data augmentations, but instead seek representations that are predictive of each other when conditioned on additional information 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}}. However, as with Joint-Embedding Architectures, representation collapse is also a concern with JEPAs; we leverage an asymmetric architecture between the 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}- and 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}}-encoders to avoid representation collapse.
items.zh: 与联合嵌入架构相比，JEPA 不寻求对一组手工数据增强不变的表示，而是寻求在条件于额外信息 𝒛 时彼此可预测的表示。然而，与联合嵌入架构一样，表示坍缩也是 JEPA 的一个问题；我们利用 𝒙 和 𝒚 编码器之间的非对称架构来避免表示坍缩。

items.capEn: Figure 3: I-JEPA. The Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture uses a single context block to predict the representations of various target blocks originating from the same image. The context encoder is a Vision Transformer (ViT), which only processes the visible context patches. The predictor is a narrow ViT that takes the context encoder output and, conditioned on positional tokens (shown in color), predicts the representations of a target block at a specific location. The target representations correspond to the outputs of the target-encoder, the weights of which are updated at each iteration via an exponential moving average of the context encoder weights.
items.capZh: 图3：I-JEPA。基于图像的联合嵌入预测架构使用单个上下文块来预测来自同一图像的不同目标块的表示。上下文编码器是一个视觉Transformer（ViT），仅处理可见的上下文块。预测器是一个窄ViT，它接收上下文编码器的输出，并在位置标记（以颜色显示）的条件下，预测特定位置的目标块的表示。目标表示对应于目标编码器的输出，其权重通过上下文编码器权重的指数移动平均在每个迭代中更新。

items.en: We now describe the proposed Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (I-JEPA), illustrated in Figure 3. The overall objective is as follows: given a context block, predict the representations of various target blocks in the same image. We use a Vision Transformer [63, 29] (ViT) architecture for the context-encoder, target-encoder, and predictor. A ViT is composed of a stack of transformer layers, each consisting of a self-attention [66] operation followed by a fully-connected MLP. Our encoder/predictor architecture is reminiscent of the generative masked autoencoders (MAE) [36] method. However, one key difference is that the I-JEPA method is non-generative and the predictions are made in representation space.
items.zh: 我们现在描述所提出的基于图像的联合嵌入预测架构（I-JEPA），如图3所示。总体目标如下：给定一个上下文块，预测同一图像中不同目标块的表示。我们使用视觉Transformer [63, 29]（ViT）架构用于上下文编码器、目标编码器和预测器。ViT由一系列Transformer层组成，每层包含一个自注意力[66]操作后接一个全连接MLP。我们的编码器/预测器架构类似于生成式掩码自编码器（MAE）[36]方法。然而，一个关键区别是I-JEPA方法是非生成式的，预测在表示空间中进行。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Examples of our context and target-masking strategy. Given an image, we randomly sample 444 target blocks with scale in the range (0.15,0.2)0.150.2(0.15,0.2) and aspect ratio in the range (0.75,1.5)0.751.5(0.75,1.5). Next, we randomly sample a context block with scale in the range (0.85,1.0)0.851.0(0.85,1.0) and remove any overlapping target blocks. Under this strategy, the target-blocks are relatively semantic, and the context-block is informative, yet sparse (efficient to process).
items.capZh: 图4：我们的上下文和目标掩码策略示例。给定一张图像，我们随机采样4个目标块，其尺度在(0.15,0.2)范围内，宽高比在(0.75,1.5)范围内。接着，我们随机采样一个上下文块，尺度在(0.85,1.0)范围内，并移除任何重叠的目标块。在这种策略下，目标块相对具有语义性，上下文块信息丰富但稀疏（处理高效）。

items.en: We first describe how we produce the targets in the I-JEPA framework: in I-JEPA, the targets correspond to the representations of image blocks. Given an input image 𝒚𝒚{\bm{y}}, we convert it into a sequence of N𝑁N non-overlapping patches, and feed this through the target-encoder fθ¯subscript𝑓¯𝜃f_{\bar{\theta}} to obtain a corresponding patch-level representation 𝒔y={𝒔y1,…,𝒔yN}subscript𝒔𝑦subscript𝒔subscript𝑦1…subscript𝒔subscript𝑦𝑁{\bm{s}}_{y}=\{{\bm{s}}_{y_{1}},\dots,{\bm{s}}_{y_{N}}\} where 𝒔yksubscript𝒔subscript𝑦𝑘{\bm{s}}_{y_{k}} is the representation associated with the kthsuperscript𝑘thk^{\text{th}} patch. To obtain the targets for our loss, we randomly sample M𝑀M (possibly overlapping) blocks from the target representations 𝒔ysubscript𝒔𝑦{\bm{s}}_{y}. We denote by Bisubscript𝐵𝑖B_{i} the mask corresponding of the ithsuperscript𝑖thi^{\text{th}} block and by 𝒔y​(i)={𝒔yj}j∈Bisubscript𝒔𝑦𝑖subscriptsubscript𝒔subscript𝑦𝑗𝑗subscript𝐵𝑖{\bm{s}}_{y}(i)=\{{\bm{s}}_{y_{j}}\}_{j\in B_{i}} its patch-level representation. Typically, we set M𝑀M equal to 4, and sample the blocks with a random aspect ratio in the range (0.75,1.5)0.751.5(0.75,1.5) and random scale in the range (0.15,0.2)0.150.2(0.15,0.2). Note that the target blocks are obtained by masking the output of the target-encoder, not the input. This distinction is crucial to ensure target representations of a high semantic level; see, e.g., [8].
items.zh: 我们首先描述如何在I-JEPA框架中生成目标：在I-JEPA中，目标对应于图像块的表示。给定输入图像y，我们将其转换为N个不重叠的块序列，并通过目标编码器f_θ̄得到对应的块级表示s_y = {s_y1, ..., s_yN}，其中s_yk是第k个块的表示。为了获得损失的目标，我们从目标表示s_y中随机采样M个（可能重叠的）块。我们用B_i表示第i个块的掩码，用s_y(i) = {s_yj}_{j∈B_i}表示其块级表示。通常，我们设置M等于4，并以随机宽高比(0.75,1.5)和随机尺度(0.15,0.2)采样块。注意，目标块是通过掩码目标编码器的输出获得的，而不是输入。这一区别对于确保目标表示具有高语义水平至关重要；参见例如[8]。

items.en: Recall, the goal behind I-JEPA is to predict the target block representations from a single context block. To obtain the context in I-JEPA, we first sample a single block 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}} from the image with a random scale in the range (0.85,1.0)0.851.0(0.85,1.0) and unit aspect ratio. We denote by Bxsubscript𝐵𝑥B_{x} the mask associated with the context block 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}. Since the target blocks are sampled independently from the context block, there may be significant overlap. To ensure a non-trivial prediction task, we remove any overlapping regions from the context block. Figure 4 shows examples of various context and target blocks in practice. Next, the masked context block, 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}, is fed through the context encoder fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} to obtain a corresponding patch-level representation 𝒔x={𝒔xj}j∈Bxsubscript𝒔𝑥subscriptsubscript𝒔subscript𝑥𝑗𝑗subscript𝐵𝑥{\bm{s}}_{x}=\{{\bm{s}}_{x_{j}}\}_{j\in B_{x}}.
items.zh: 回顾一下，I-JEPA的目标是从单个上下文块预测目标块表示。为了在I-JEPA中获得上下文，我们首先从图像中采样一个单独的块x，其随机尺度在(0.85,1.0)范围内，宽高比为1。我们用B_x表示与上下文块x关联的掩码。由于目标块独立于上下文块采样，可能存在显著重叠。为了确保非平凡预测任务，我们从上下文块中移除任何重叠区域。图4展示了实践中各种上下文和目标块的示例。接下来，掩码后的上下文块x被送入上下文编码器f_θ，以得到对应的块级表示s_x = {s_xj}_{j∈B_x}。

items.en: Given the output of the context encoder, 𝒔xsubscript𝒔𝑥{\bm{s}}_{x}, we wish to predict the M𝑀M target block representations 𝒔y​(1),…,𝒔y​(M)subscript𝒔𝑦1…subscript𝒔𝑦𝑀{\bm{s}}_{y}(1),\ldots,{\bm{s}}_{y}(M). To that end, for a given target block 𝒔y​(i)subscript𝒔𝑦𝑖{\bm{s}}_{y}(i) corresponding to a target mask Bisubscript𝐵𝑖B_{i}, the predictor gϕ​(⋅,⋅)subscript𝑔italic-ϕ⋅⋅g_{\phi}(\cdot,\cdot) takes as input the output of the context encoder 𝒔xsubscript𝒔𝑥{\bm{s}}_{x} and a mask token for each patch we wish to predict, {𝒎j}j∈Bisubscriptsubscript𝒎𝑗𝑗subscript𝐵𝑖\{{\bm{m}}_{j}\}_{j\in B_{i}}, and outputs a patch-level prediction 𝒔^y​(i)={𝒔^yj}j∈Bi=gϕ​(𝒔x,{𝒎j}j∈Bi)subscript^𝒔𝑦𝑖subscriptsubscript^𝒔subscript𝑦𝑗𝑗subscript𝐵𝑖subscript𝑔italic-ϕsubscript𝒔𝑥subscriptsubscript𝒎𝑗𝑗subscript𝐵𝑖\hat{{\bm{s}}}_{y}(i)=\{\hat{{\bm{s}}}_{y_{j}}\}_{j\in B_{i}}=g_{\phi}({\bm{s}}_{x},\{{\bm{m}}_{j}\}_{j\in B_{i}}). The mask tokens are parameterized by a shared learnable vector with an added positional embedding. Since we wish to make predictions for M𝑀M target blocks, we apply our predictor M𝑀M times, each time conditioning on the mask tokens corresponding to the target-block locations we wish to predict, and obtain predictions 𝒔^y​(1),…,𝒔^y​(M)subscript^𝒔𝑦1…subscript^𝒔𝑦𝑀\hat{{\bm{s}}}_{y}(1),\ldots,\hat{{\bm{s}}}_{y}(M).
items.zh: 给定上下文编码器的输出s_x，我们希望预测M个目标块表示s_y(1), ..., s_y(M)。为此，对于对应于目标掩码B_i的给定目标块s_y(i)，预测器g_ϕ(·,·)接收上下文编码器的输出s_x和每个待预测块的掩码标记{m_j}_{j∈B_i}作为输入，并输出块级预测ŝ_y(i) = {ŝ_yj}_{j∈B_i} = g_ϕ(s_x, {m_j}_{j∈B_i})。掩码标记由一个共享的可学习向量参数化，并添加了位置嵌入。由于我们要对M个目标块进行预测，我们应用预测器M次，每次以对应于待预测目标块位置的掩码标记为条件，得到预测ŝ_y(1), ..., ŝ_y(M)。

items.en: The loss is simply the average L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} distance between the predicted patch-level representations 𝒔^y​(i)subscript^𝒔𝑦𝑖\hat{{\bm{s}}}_{y}(i) and the target patch-level representation 𝒔y​(i)subscript𝒔𝑦𝑖{\bm{s}}_{y}(i); i.e.,
items.zh: 损失函数是预测的块级表示ŝ_y(i)与目标块级表示s_y(i)之间的平均L2距离；即：

items.en: The parameters of the predictor, ϕitalic-ϕ\phi, and context encoder, θ𝜃\theta, are learned through gradient-based optimization, while the parameters of the target encoder θ¯¯𝜃\bar{\theta} are updated via an exponential moving average of the context-encoder parameters. The use of an exponential moving average target-encoder has proven essential for training JEAs with Vision Transformers [25, 79, 18], we find the same to be true for I-JEPA.
items.zh: 预测器的参数ϕ和上下文编码器的参数θ通过基于梯度的优化学习，而目标编码器的参数θ̄通过上下文编码器参数的指数移动平均更新。使用指数移动平均目标编码器已被证明对于使用视觉Transformer训练JEA至关重要[25, 79, 18]，我们发现对于I-JEPA也是如此。

items.en: A long line of work has explored visual representation learning by predicting the values of missing or corrupted sensory inputs. Denoising autoencoders use random noise as input corruption [67]. Context encoders regress an entire image region based on its surrounding [57]. Other works cast image colorization as a denoising task [77, 46, 47].
items.zh: 一系列长期工作通过预测缺失或损坏的感官输入的值来探索视觉表示学习。去噪自编码器使用随机噪声作为输入损坏[67]。上下文编码器根据周围区域回归整个图像区域[57]。其他工作将图像着色视为去噪任务[77, 46, 47]。

items.en: The idea of image denoising has recently been revisited in the context of masked image modelling [36, 71, 9], where a Vision Transformer [29] is used to reconstruct missing input patches. The work on Masked Autoencoders (MAE) [36] proposed an efficient architecture that only requires the encoder to process visible image patches. By reconstructing missing patches in pixels space, MAE achieves strong performance when fine-tuned end-to-end on large labeled datasets and exhibits good scaling properties. BEiT [9] predicts the value of missing patches in a tokenized space; specifically, tokenizing image patches using a frozen discreteVAE, which is trained on a dataset containing 250 million images [58]. Yet, pixel-level pre-training has been shown to outperform BEiT for fine-tuning [36]. Another work, SimMIM [71], explores reconstruction targets based on the classic Histogram of Gradients [27] feature space, and demonstrates some advantage over pixel space reconstruction. Different from those works, our representation space is learned during training through a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture. Our goal is to learn semantic representations that do not require extensive fine-tuning on downstream tasks.
items.zh: 图像去噪的思想最近在掩码图像建模的背景下被重新审视[36, 71, 9]，其中使用视觉Transformer[29]来重建缺失的输入块。掩码自编码器（MAE）[36]的工作提出了一种高效的架构，仅需编码器处理可见的图像块。通过在像素空间中重建缺失块，MAE在大型标注数据集上进行端到端微调时取得了强劲性能，并表现出良好的缩放属性。BEiT[9]在标记化空间中预测缺失块的值；具体来说，使用冻结的离散VAE对图像块进行标记化，该VAE在包含2.5亿张图像的数据集上训练[58]。然而，像素级预训练已被证明在微调方面优于BEiT[36]。另一项工作SimMIM[71]探索了基于经典梯度直方图[27]特征空间的重建目标，并展示了相对于像素空间重建的一些优势。与这些工作不同，我们的表示空间通过联合嵌入预测架构在训练过程中学习。我们的目标是学习语义表示，无需在下游任务上进行大量微调。

items.en: Closest to our work is data2vec [8] and Context Autoencoders [25]. The data2vec method learns to predict the representation of missing patches computed through an online target encoder; by avoiding handcrafted augmentations, the method can be applied to diverse modalities with promising results in vision, text and speech. Context Autoencoders use an encoder/decoder architecture optimized via the sum of a reconstruction loss and an alignment constraint, which enforces predictability of missing patches in representation space. Compared to these methods, I-JEPA exhibits significant improvements in computational efficiency and learns more semantic off-the-shelf representations. Concurrent to our work, data2vec-v2 [7] explores efficient architectures for learning with various modalities.
items.zh: 与我们工作最接近的是data2vec[8]和上下文自编码器[25]。data2vec方法学习预测通过在线目标编码器计算的缺失块的表示；通过避免手工数据增强，该方法可应用于多种模态，在视觉、文本和语音方面取得了有前景的结果。上下文自编码器使用编码器/解码器架构，通过重建损失和对齐约束的和进行优化，这强制了表示空间中缺失块的可预测性。与这些方法相比，I-JEPA在计算效率上表现出显著改进，并学习到更具语义性的现成表示。与我们的工作同时，data2vec-v2[7]探索了用于多种模态学习的高效架构。

items.en: We also compare I-JEPA with various methods based on joint-embedding architectures; e.g., DINO [18], MSN [4] and iBOT [79]. Theses methods rely on hand-crafted data augmentations during pretraining to learn semantic image representations. The work on MSN [4], uses masking as an additional data-augmentation during pretraining, while iBOT combines a data2vec-style patch-level reconstruction loss with the DINO view-invariance loss. Common to these approaches is the need to process multiple user-generated views of each input image, thereby hindering scalability. By contrast, I-JEPA only requires processing a single view of each image. We find that a ViT-Huge/14 trained with I-JEPA requires less computational effort than a ViT-Small/16 trained with iBOT.
items.zh: 我们还将I-JEPA与基于联合嵌入架构的各种方法进行比较；例如，DINO[18]、MSN[4]和iBOT[79]。这些方法在预训练期间依赖手工数据增强来学习语义图像表示。MSN[4]的工作在预训练期间使用掩码作为额外的数据增强，而iBOT将data2vec风格的块级重建损失与DINO视角不变性损失相结合。这些方法的共同点是需要处理每个输入图像的多个用户生成视角，从而阻碍了可扩展性。相比之下，I-JEPA仅需处理每个图像的单个视角。我们发现，使用I-JEPA训练的ViT-Huge/14所需的计算量少于使用iBOT训练的ViT-Small/16。

items.en: To demonstrate that I-JEPA learns high-level representations without relying on hand-crafted data-augmentations, we report results on various image classification tasks using the linear probing and partial fine-tuning protocols. In this section, we consider self-supervised models that have been pretrained on the ImageNet-1K dataset [60]. Pretraining and evaluation implementation details are described in the Appendix A. All I-JEPA models are trained at resolution 224×224224224224\times 224 pixels, unless stated otherwise.
items.zh: 为了证明I-JEPA在不依赖手工数据增强的情况下学习高级表示，我们使用线性探测和部分微调协议在各种图像分类任务上报告结果。在本节中，我们考虑在ImageNet-1K数据集[60]上预训练的自监督模型。预训练和评估的实现细节在附录A中描述。除非另有说明，所有I-JEPA模型均在224×224像素分辨率下训练。

items.en: As demonstrated in Section 5, I-JEPA learns semantic image representations that significantly improve the downstream image classification performance of previous methods, such as MAE and data2vec. Additionally, I-JEPA benefits from scale and can close the gap, and even surpass, view-invariance based methods that leverage extra hand-crafted data augmentations. In this section, we find that I-JEPA also learns local image features and surpasses view-invariance based methods on low-level and dense prediction tasks, such as object counting and depth prediction.
items.zh: 如第5节所示，I-JEPA学习到的语义图像表示显著提高了先前方法（如MAE和data2vec）的下游图像分类性能。此外，I-JEPA受益于规模，可以缩小甚至超越利用额外手工数据增强的基于视角不变性的方法。在本节中，我们发现I-JEPA还学习局部图像特征，并在低级和密集预测任务（如目标计数和深度预测）上超越基于视角不变性的方法。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Scaling. Semi-supervised evaluation on ImageNet-1K 1% as a function of pretraining GPU hours. I-JEPA requires less compute than previous methods to achieve strong performance. Compared to MAE and data2vec, I-JEPA obtains a significant speedup by requiring fewer pretraining epochs. Compared to iBOT, which relies on hand-crafted data-augmentations, a huge I-JEPA model (ViT-H/14) requires less compute than their smallest model (ViT-S/16).
items.capZh: 图5：缩放。在ImageNet-1K 1%上的半监督评估作为预训练GPU小时的函数。I-JEPA需要比先前方法更少的计算量来实现强劲性能。与MAE和data2vec相比，I-JEPA通过需要更少的预训练轮次获得了显著的加速。与依赖手工数据增强的iBOT相比，一个巨大的I-JEPA模型（ViT-H/14）需要的计算量少于其最小的模型（ViT-S/16）。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visualization of I-JEPA predictor representations. For each image: first column contains the original image; second column contains the context image, which is processed by a pretrained I-JEPA ViT-H/14 encoder. Green bounding boxes in subsequent columns contain samples from a generative model decoding the output of the pretrained I-JEPA predictor, which is conditioned on positional mask tokens corresponding to the location of the green bounding box. Qualities that are common across samples represent information that contained is in the I-JEPA prediction. The I-JEPA predictor is correctly capturing positional uncertainty and producing high-level object parts with a correct pose (e.g., the back of the bird and top of a car). Qualities that vary across samples represent information that is not contained in the representation. In this case, the I-JEPA predictor discards the precise low-level details as well as background information.
items.capZh: 图6：I-JEPA预测器表示的可视化。对于每张图像：第一列包含原始图像；第二列包含上下文图像，由预训练的I-JEPA ViT-H/14编码器处理。后续列中的绿色边界框包含从生成模型解码预训练I-JEPA预测器输出的样本，该预测器以对应于绿色边界框位置的位置掩码标记为条件。样本间共有的质量表示I-JEPA预测中包含的信息。I-JEPA预测器正确捕获了位置不确定性，并生成了具有正确姿态的高级对象部分（例如，鸟的背部和汽车的顶部）。样本间变化的质量表示表示中不包含的信息。在这种情况下，I-JEPA预测器丢弃了精确的低级细节以及背景信息。

items.en: I-JEPA is highly scalable compared to previous approaches. Figure 5 shows semi-supervised evaluation on 1% ImageNet-1K as a function of GPU hours. I-JEPA requires less compute than previous methods and achieves strong performance without relying on hand-crafted data-augmentations. Compared to reconstruction-based methods, such as MAE, which directly use pixels as targets, I-JEPA introduces extra overhead by computing targets in representation space (about 7% slower time per iteration). However, since I-JEPA converges in roughly 5×5\times fewer iterations, we still see significant compute savings in practice. Compared to view-invariance based methods, such as iBOT, which rely on hand-crafted data augmentations to create and process multiple views of each image, I-JEPA also runs significantly faster. In particular, a huge I-JEPA model (ViT-H/14) requires less compute than a small iBOT model (ViT-S/16).
items.zh: I-JEPA与先前方法相比具有高度可扩展性。图5显示了在1% ImageNet-1K上的半监督评估作为GPU小时的函数。I-JEPA需要比先前方法更少的计算量，并在不依赖手工数据增强的情况下实现强劲性能。与基于重建的方法（如MAE，直接使用像素作为目标）相比，I-JEPA通过在表示空间中计算目标引入了额外开销（每次迭代慢约7%）。然而，由于I-JEPA收敛所需的迭代次数大约少5倍，我们在实践中仍然看到显著的计算节省。与基于视角不变性的方法（如iBOT，依赖手工数据增强来创建和处理每个图像的多个视角）相比，I-JEPA也运行得更快。特别是，一个巨大的I-JEPA模型（ViT-H/14）需要的计算量少于一个小型iBOT模型（ViT-S/16）。

items.en: We also find I-JEPA to benefit from pretraining with larger datasets. Table 5 shows transfer learning performance on semantic and low level tasks when increasing the size of the pretraining dataset (IN1K versus IN22K). Transfer learning performance on these conceptually different tasks improves when pretraining on a larger more diverse dataset.
items.zh: 我们还发现I-JEPA受益于在更大数据集上的预训练。表5显示了当增加预训练数据集大小（IN1K与IN22K）时，在语义和低级任务上的迁移学习性能。在这些概念上不同的任务上的迁移学习性能在更大更多样化的数据集上预训练时得到改善。

items.en: The role of the predictor in I-JEPA is to take the output of the context encoder and, conditioned on positional mask tokens, to predict the representations of a target black at the location specified by the mask tokens. One natural question is whether the predictor conditioned on the positional mask tokens is learning to correctly capture positional uncertainty in the target. To qualitatively investigate this question, we visualize the outputs of the predictor. We use the following visualization approach to enable the research community to independently reproduce our findings. After pretraining, we freeze the context-encoder and predictor weights, and train a decoder following the RCDM framework [13] to map the average-pool of the predictor outputs back to pixel space. Figure 6 shows decoder outputs for various random seeds. Qualities that are common across samples represent information that is contained in the average-pooled predictor representation. The I-JEPA predictor correctly captures positional uncertainty and produces high-level object parts with the correct pose (e.g., back of the bird and top of the car).
items.zh: I-JEPA中预测器的作用是接收上下文编码器的输出，并在位置掩码标记的条件下，预测由掩码标记指定位置的目标块的表示。一个自然的问题是，以位置掩码标记为条件的预测器是否学会了正确捕获目标中的位置不确定性。为了定性研究这个问题，我们可视化了预测器的输出。我们使用以下可视化方法，使研究社区能够独立复现我们的发现。预训练后，我们冻结上下文编码器和预测器的权重，并按照RCDM框架[13]训练一个解码器，将预测器输出的平均池化映射回像素空间。图6显示了不同随机种子下的解码器输出。样本间共有的质量表示平均池化预测器表示中包含的信息。I-JEPA预测器正确捕获了位置不确定性，并生成了具有正确姿态的高级对象部分（例如，鸟的背部和汽车的顶部）。

items.en: We proposed I-JEPA, a simple and efficient method for learning semantic image representations without relying on hand-crafted data augmentations. We show that by predicting in representation space, I-JEPA converges faster than pixel reconstruction methods and learns representations of a high semantic level. In contrast to view-invariance based methods, I-JEPA highlights a path for learning general representations with joint-embedding architectures, without relying on hand-crafted view augmentations.
items.zh: 我们提出了I-JEPA，一种简单高效的方法，用于在不依赖手工数据增强的情况下学习语义图像表示。我们表明，通过在表示空间中进行预测，I-JEPA比像素重建方法收敛更快，并学习到高语义水平的表示。与基于视角不变性的方法相比，I-JEPA突出了使用联合嵌入架构学习通用表示而不依赖手工视角增强的路径。
